prompt: Full system redesign of 30-module training platform with phased execution, subagents, three-panel layout, theme cycling, and progress tracking.

assertions.text: Output is organized into distinct phases (discovery, design, foundation, components, pages, audit)
Explores existing codebase before designing (Phase 1 discovery)
Produces a design specification document before writing code
Defines three-panel shell (left nav, center content, right support)
Uses named themes (Signal Cobalt, Arctic Steel, Linear, Gamma Dark) not generic dark/light
References specific layout IDs from registry (nav-hub, two-col, stat-cards, eng-*)
Defines progress tracking at multiple levels (course, module, section)
Includes theme cycling strategy across modules
